content:
If 80% of students work together and complete a secret in-class event, the entire class “wins” the True Ending.
Requires collective strategy & coordination.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Creates multiple paths to victory, not just individual success.
✔ Encourages strategic choices—do students work alone or together?
✔ Encourages teamwork and hidden strategies.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 6.1

1. Should XP be redeemable for in-class perks (e.g., extra revision chances, late submission passes)?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 259 (chunk 259/555)
